monthlyRevenueAvailableAsOf.description: MonthlyRevenue row is visible when releaseDate <= asOfDate (Taiwan UTC+8)

monthlyRevenueReasonContextPresent.description: MonthlyRevenue rows have non-empty reasonContext after P26A enrichment

monthlyRevenueFactorEvidencePresent.description: MonthlyRevenue rows have non-empty factorEvidence after P26A enrichment

newsEventContextVisibleAsOf.description: NewsEvent context visible when publishedAt <= asOfDate (Taiwan UTC+8). ingestedAt is observability only.

financialReportContextVisibleAsOf.description: FinancialReport context visible per availabilityDate priority: filingDate->announcementDate->publishedAt->availableAt

contextReadOnly.description: All three context adapters are read-only — no mutation of input rows or corpus

entersAlphaScoreFalseForNewsAndFinancial.description: NewsEvent and FinancialReport contexts do not enter alphaScore or recommendationBucket computation

alphaScoreInvariant.description: alphaScore values in P3/P19 corpus are unchanged vs P26C baseline (0 mismatch)

recommendationBucketInvariant.description: recommendationBucket values in P3/P19 corpus are unchanged vs P26C baseline (0 mismatch)

disclaimer: No investment recommendations. No ROI/win-rate/profit/outperform/buy/sell claims. Research and coverage analysis only.
